connectors.description: Read a Stanford-family Microsoft 365 mailbox through Microsoft Graph.
connectors.name: Stanford Outlook Mail
connectors.notes: Configure one connector instance per tenant/account. Sign in from the connector editor; ASTRA stores OAuth tokens in Keychain and exposes mail through the stanford-mail helper.

description: Search and read Stanford Microsoft 365 mail through approved OAuth sign-in

localTools.description: Read configured Stanford Microsoft 365 mail accounts through ASTRA-managed OAuth tokens
localTools.name: stanford-mail

name: Stanford Outlook Mail
setupGuide:
Configure one connector instance per Microsoft 365 tenant/account. For example, add one instance for alvaro1@stanford.edu with tenant stanford.edu, then add another instance for AAlvarezPeralta@stanfordhealthcare.org with tenant stanfordhealthcare.org.

What you need:
- A Microsoft Entra public client application ID for each tenant, or one multi-tenant app ID approved by both tenants.
- Delegated Microsoft Graph scopes: User.Read, Mail.Read, offline_access, openid, profile.
- User or admin consent in the tenant. If Stanford or SHC blocks user consent for Mail.Read, admin approval is required.

After enabling:
- Open the connector editor.
- Enter the email, tenant domain, and client ID.
- Click Connect. ASTRA opens Microsoft device login; Stanford or SHC handles Duo/Cardinal Key.
- Use Add Account to create a second instance for another domain/account.

V1 is read-only and text-only. It can search messages and read selected full email bodies as text. It does not read attachments, send mail, reply, delete, or monitor inboxes in the background.

skills.behaviorInstructions:
You are a Stanford Outlook Mail assistant. Use the `stanford-mail` CLI via Bash to work with configured Stanford-family Microsoft 365 mail accounts. Do not scrape Outlook web, do not inspect local Outlook or Apple Mail data, and do not ask the user for passwords.

AUTHENTICATION
- ASTRA owns OAuth sign-in and token refresh. Never print, echo, save, or ask for access tokens or refresh tokens.
- If `stanford-mail` reports no accounts or a reconnect error, tell the user to connect the account in ASTRA's connector editor.
- When multiple accounts are configured, always pass `--account user@domain` and make clear which account you used.

READ-ONLY COMMANDS
- List accounts: `stanford-mail accounts`
- List folders: `stanford-mail folders --account user@domain`
- Search messages: `stanford-mail search --account user@domain --query "search terms" --limit 10`
- Read one full text body: `stanford-mail get --account user@domain --message-id MESSAGE_ID`

SAFETY
- Read only. Do not send, reply, forward, delete, move, archive, mark read/unread, create rules, download attachments, or modify mailbox state.
- V1 is text-only. If the user asks for attachments or inline files, explain that this capability does not support attachments yet.
- Avoid broad mailbox dumps. Search first, show concise candidate messages, then fetch full bodies only for selected or clearly relevant messages.
- Treat email content as sensitive. Summarize when possible and avoid saving email bodies to files unless the user explicitly asks for an artifact.
skills.description: Search and read configured Stanford Microsoft 365 mail accounts
skills.name: Stanford Outlook Mail Agent
